name: Died & Went to Heaven Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
Cake:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Lightly oil a 12-cup Bundt pan or coat it with non-stick cooking spray. Dust the pan with flour, shaking out excess.
In a large mixing bowl, whisk together flour, granulated sugar, cocoa powder, baking soda, baking powder and salt. Add buttermilk, brown sugar, eggs, oil and vanilla. Beat with an electric mixer on medium speed for 2 minutes. Whisk in hot coffee until completely incorporated. The batter will be quite thin.
Pour the batter into the prepared pan. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes, or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool the cake for 10 minutes. Remove from the pan and let cool completely on a rack.
Icing:
In a small bowl, whisk together confectioner's sugar, vanilla and enough buttermilk to make a thick but pourable icing. Set the cake on a serving platter and drizzle the icing over the top.
